title: tilia paucicostata subsp. paucicostata
intro: Tilia paucicostata subsp. paucicostata, also known as the narrow-leaved lime tree, is a subspecies of deciduous tree belonging to the Tilia genus. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate stress. The health benefits of Tilia paucicostata subsp. paucicostata include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as providing relief from insomnia and other sleep disorders. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
